HVAC Company — Southeast U.S.

On paper this looks textbook — 22-year family business, retiring owner, dominant in its metro market. Revenue $1.87M, EBITDA $427K, asking $1.2M. That's a 2.8x multiple, well inside my ceiling. Three of five Bulletproof metrics pass clean.

But here's where I hit the brakes.

"Six weeks of working capital — and you're buying in March, two months before peak season."

Here's exactly what I'd negotiate before signing anything — and the specific counter I'd put in the LOI.

🔓
